meta.notes: Beat Swarm Music Lab gate-start tap-orb handoff debug: run the real gate corridor, then tap-orb foundation creation, then low-intensity handoff. Use tap_orb_foundation_committed_to_bass_drive and tap_orb_foundation_lane_resolved events to compare committed Bass Drive motif/instrument against director foundation lane playback. Expected result: while tap orbs are active, temporary tap loop plays; after completion, committed Bass Drive patternChain remains recognizable and uses the Bass Drive theme instrument/note.
